description: ol-duplicate-binder (issue #440): a `filter` comprehension whose destructuring item binder repeats a name (`filter [:x :x] in …`) binds the same name twice in one pattern, caught at `check()` just like `map`/`reduce`/`for … in`. `params` carry the repeated `name` and `form:"destructuring"`; the span points at the second `:x`. `:pairs` is declared first so no `ol-undefined-var` fires.
